title: chaenorhinum johnstonii
intro: Chaenorhinum johnstonii, also known as Johnston's toadflax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is an annual herb with small, delicate flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Chaenorhinum johnstonii is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health issues such as respiratory problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
